Lenis + GSAP + ScrollTrigger smooth scroll pipeline integrated across script + entry animations + cockpit jump

hyperedges.label: UWM Secondary Logomark variant set
hyperedges.description: All color and format variants (PNG/SVG; full-color-on-light, full-color-on-dark, white, black) collectively representing the single UWM Secondary Logomark concept.
All four PNG color variants represent the same UWM Secondary Logo concept across white, full-color-on-dark, black, and full-color-on-light treatments.

hyperedges.label: UWM Primary Logo variant set
hyperedges.description: All variant file-assets that represent the UWM Primary Logo concept across color treatments (black, white, full-color on light, full-color on dark) and formats (PNG, SVG).

nodes.source_file: image/education logo/UWM Primary Logo_Full Color on Dark.png
nodes.description: UWM commonly refers to University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee; inferred from filename and the gold ribbon brand mark.

nodes.label: HEX Lab Icon
nodes.description: Stylized icon depicting a person's head profile wearing a VR/AR headset on a blue-green gradient background. Represents an XR/VR research lab (HEX Lab).

nodes.label: HEX Lab
nodes.description: Research lab inferred from folder name 'hex_lab'; visual content (VR headset) suggests focus on XR/extended reality / human-experience research.

nodes.label: Jerald Thomas
nodes.description: Portrait photo of a man with brown hair, beard, wearing a dark navy button-up shirt against a dark gray background. Name extracted from filename. Folder context (hex_lab) suggests affiliation with HEX Lab, likely as a faculty member or principal investigator.

nodes.label: Nahid
nodes.description: Professional portrait of a young man with dark curly hair and beard, wearing a navy blazer over a white shirt, dark studio backdrop. Watermarked 'Ethugraphy'. Identified by filename and folder as the site owner Nahid.

nodes.label: UWM Secondary Logomark
nodes.description: Secondary logomark for UWM (United Wholesale Mortgage), featuring a stylized 'UWM' wordmark in bold sans-serif type sitting above a wavy yellow ribbon/flag-like graphic element. Distinct from the primary logo, used as an alternate brand mark.

nodes.label: UWM Secondary Logomark - Full Color on Light (PNG)
nodes.description: PNG raster of the UWM Secondary Logomark in full color (black 'UWM' wordmark with yellow/gold #FFBD00 wavy ribbon) on a light/white background.
